occupation: Chief Marketing Officer at Bauer Media Outdoor UK
headline: Chief Marketing Officer at Bauer Media Outdoor UK - Europe Marketing Lead
summary:
I am a passionate, creative and pragmatic leader, with a track record of exceeding expectations and successfully leading change. I take a strategic, long term view built around people, purpose and customers. 

I have over 30 years media sales, marketing and communications experienced across business press, consumer magazines, national newspapers, outdoor and digital media.

I am very proud to be a member of both the Bauer Media Outdoor UK and Bauer Media Outdoor Europe leadership teams.

Specialties: 
Marketing 
Communications 
Revenue growth
Sales strategy
Digital advertising sales leadership
Multi-platform advertising sales transformation
Digital automated trading
Change management

experiences.description: Agency, poster specialist and client sales across a national portfolio. Responsible for business in access of £10m pa. Selling advertising packages on buses and the London Underground.

recommendations:
Andrew Morley

Martin gets the job done and is one of the nicest, most effective leaders I have ever had the pleasure to work with.

Mark Mahoney

Martin is a very smart, strategic and successful Marketing Director. I had the pleasure of working with Martin at Clear Channel and reported to him for a number of years. I found Martin to be consistently supportive and a wise influence who consistently empowers his team.  Martin led our marketing team to great success, winning awards and making a substantial contribution to the most successful commercial periods in Clear Channels history.

Mark Mahoney

Martin is a very smart, strategic and successful Marketing Director. I had the pleasure of working with Martin at Clear Channel and reported to him for a number of years. I found Martin to be consistently supportive and a wise influence who consistently empowers his team.  Martin led our marketing team to great success, winning awards and making a substantial contribution to the most successful commercial periods in Clear Channel’s history.
